metadata.archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (adapted for tech elegance)
metadata.description: Minimal, elegant, and subtle futuristic CV/resume website for a Senior Software Engineer.

design_principles.spacing: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-8 to p-24 heavily. Containers with borders must have internal padding.
design_principles.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Heavy use of asymmetrical grids (The Bento Protocol).
design_principles.motion: Subtle micro-interactions, lenis smooth scrolling, staggered entrance animations. No distracting heavy effects.
design_principles.accessibility: High contrast ratios, reduced motion support, semantic HTML, data-testid on all interactive elements.

typography.rules: Never use Inter for headings. Keep hierarchy strict. Do not center by default.

heading.usage: H1, H2, H3. Tight letter spacing (tracking-tight).

body.usage: Paragraphs, long form text. Loose line height (leading-relaxed).

accent.usage: Overlines, tech skills, small metrics. Uppercase, wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).

color_palette.global_rules: No generic gradients. Tinted greys only. High contrast for readability.

layout_strategies.global_grid: Mobile-first approach. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12. Generous gap-8 to gap-12.
layout_strategies.bento_grid: MODE A: The Tetris Grid for Projects. Mix of col-span-4, col-span-8 to create asymmetry.
layout_strategies.surfaces: Use Grid Borders (exposing the skeleton) for the Experience and Skills sections to enhance the technical IT aesthetic.

components_and_sections.name: Header & Navigation
components_and_sections.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 transition-all duration-300
elements: Nav Links (hidden on mobile, visible on desktop)

components_and_sections.name: Hero Section
components_and_sections.background: Uses the subtle futuristic AI-generated backgrounds (light/dark adaptive), absolutely positioned with opacity to allow text readability.
components_and_sections.content: Large H1 greeting, dynamic title ('Senior Software Engineer'), short impactful bio. Two buttons: 'View Work' and 'Download CV' (data-testid='hero-download-cv-btn').
components_and_sections.imagery: Floating profile portrait with a very soft ambient shadow and a 1px inner border. Image max-h-[80vh] md:max-h-none.

components_and_sections.name: Experience Timeline
components_and_sections.layout: Vertical line with nodes. Grid borders aesthetic.
components_and_sections.style: Minimalist. Overlines in JetBrains Mono for dates.
components_and_sections.interactions: Hovering over a role subtly illuminates the timeline node (accent color glow).

components_and_sections.name: Skills Array
components_and_sections.layout: Dense bento grid or flex wrap. Categorized (Frontend, Backend, Cloud).
components_and_sections.style: Technical look. 1px solid border, flat surface. JetBrains Mono for the skill names. Use lucide-react icons for each category.

components_and_sections.name: Projects Showcase
components_and_sections.cards: Image heavy, cardless or extremely subtle 1px border. Hovering scales the image slightly inside an overflow-hidden container.
components_and_sections.content: Project Title, Tech Stack (Mono font), link to view (data-testid='project-link').

components_and_sections.name: Certifications & Education
components_and_sections.layout: List format with right-aligned dates. Clean tabular data approach to emphasize 'Swiss' aesthetic.

components_and_sections.name: Testimonials
components_and_sections.layout: Horizontal scroll or simple minimal carousel.
components_and_sections.style: Large quote marks, highly readable typography. Profile picture of the recommender, name, and role.

components_and_sections.name: Blog / Insights
components_and_sections.layout: Simple list of articles with date, read time, and title. Extremely minimal, text-focused.

components_and_sections.name: Contact Section & Footer
components_and_sections.layout: Massive spacing (py-32). Two columns: Left is large text 'Let's Build Something', Right is the Contact Form.
components_and_sections.form: Shadcn highly customized. 1px bottom borders for inputs (linear/aceternity look), no heavy backgrounds. data-testid on inputs and submit button.
components_and_sections.footer: Grid borders. Links to socials. Minimal copyright.

dark_mode.description: Subtle futuristic dark background, minimal geometric grid lines, soft ambient glow, deep obsidian.

light_mode.description: Subtle futuristic light background, minimal silver geometric grid lines, soft ambient glow.

portrait.description: Professional tech portrait of a person with a grey sweater, clean background.

project_placeholders.description: Modern app display with clean aesthetic.

interactive_elements_and_testing.guidelines: Every button, link, and form element must have a data-testid for end-to-end testing.

library_recommendations.motion: framer-motion for page transitions and micro-interactions
library_recommendations.ui_components: shadcn/ui (heavily customized, stripping out default Vercel aesthetic)
